author: gb9t
content: Iteration 3: mlx5-sf.md committed (770fce1, 208 lines). Covers Sub-Functions — vport-without-PCI-BDF for k8s/cloud-native scale (4096+ SFs per BlueField-3). Headline Rust translation: 5-state mlx5_vhca_state FSM becomes phantom-typed Sf<S> with consuming transitions — closes UAF class from mlx5_ib SF teardown coupling. Grsec emphasizes scale: sfnum LATENT_ENTROPY randomization (defeat tenant fingerprinting), cap-derived count cap (DoS prevention), VHCA event payload validation (untrusted-FW), state-transition allowlist on event, aux-driver allowlist (blocks third-party shadow). Next iteration: drivers/net/ethernet/mellanox/mlx5/core/lag/ — multi-PF LAG aggregation (active-backup/active-active across two ConnectX PFs).
